justification:
NorthCart deduction NC-104882 is valid in full. The retailer claimed 13,600 units × $0.50 = $6,800.00 against PROMO-2026-Q1-001 (October Snack Scan — Pita & Pretzel TPR) for the period 2025-10-06 through 2025-11-02, covering SKUs MF-SN-001 and MF-SN-002. 

Verification:
1. PROMO-2026-Q1-001 is an authorized Meridian scan-based promotion for NorthCart covering exactly those two SKUs, at a rate of $0.50/unit scanned, active within that exact date window, with a $10,000 funding cap (contract:northcart:section-2.1).
2. Point-of-sale data confirms 13,600 total units scanned across all 4 weeks — matching the claimed quantity precisely (MF-SN-001: 7,455 units; MF-SN-002: 6,145 units).
3. Scanned unit prices ($2.49 for MF-SN-001 and $2.79 for MF-SN-002) confirm the required temporary price reduction was in effect for every week of the promotional period, satisfying the promo's performance requirement.
4. The settled amount of $6,800.00 is below the $10,000 funding cap.
5. No prior settlement exists for reference NC-104882 — not a duplicate.
6. The amount of $6,800.00 is within the $10,000 auto-settlement threshold.

All authorization, rate, SKU, period, performance, and cap requirements are satisfied. Full approval is warranted.
